displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #2: Initiates of the Sith
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2 is the second, and last, issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Freedon Nadd Uprising series of comics. It was published on September 1, 1994 by Dark Horse Comics.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #2: Initiates of the Sith
